forbidden: any color not derived from teal #2d6679, black #0a0a0a, or white #ffffff
pure-saturation accents (red, orange, yellow, green, magenta)

display.use_for: cover headlines, slide headlines, pull quotes, stat numbers
display.notes: Variable axes locked to soft=0 wonk=0 for sharpest authoritative read. Use weight 900 for cover, 700 for slide headlines, 700 italic for pull quotes.

body.use_for: all running body copy, supporting text, captions on light backgrounds
body.notes: Designed to be neutral. Never let Inter compete with Fraunces — Inter is the disappearing partner.

mono.use_for: page indicators (01 / 07), source attributions, data labels, stat captions
mono.notes: Adds technical signature without introducing a second 'real' font.

forbidden: any second serif paired with Fraunces (creates conflict)
Montserrat, Poppins, Roboto, or other Canva-default sans (undercuts authority)
Geist, Space Grotesk, Manrope (compete with Fraunces for personality)
more than three font families across the system

rules: first slide always teal (cover hook stands out in feed)
last slide always black (CTA gets dramatic stop)
every third interior slide is teal-bg (visual rhythm)
never two teal slides in a row except slide 1
